ksa_text: Ability to define, operationalize, and embed trustworthy AI principles—including validity, reliability, safety, security, resilience, accountability, and transparency—into AI system design and organizational governance processes.

dcwf.top_element_label: Develop and Implement cybersecurity independent audit processes for application software/networks/systems and oversee ongoing independent audits to ensure that operational and Research and Design (R&D) processes and procedures are in compliance with organizational and mandatory cybersecurity requirements and accurately followed by Systems Administrators and other cybersecurity staff when performing their day-to-day activities.

nice.top_element_label: Knowledge of risk mitigation principles and practices

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

Develop and Implement cybersecurity independent audit processes for application software/networks/systems and oversee ongoing independent audits to ensure that operational and Research and Design (R&D) processes and procedures are in compliance with organizational and mandatory cybersecurity requirements and accurately followed by Systems Administrators and other cybersecurity staff when performing their day-to-day activities.
Knowledge of risk mitigation principles and practices

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge case — excluded on balance: ability from AI Governance (affinity 0.60); strategic/implementation framing outweighs governance signals. STRM composite is strong (0.4914). A Federated Governance Group Representative would be aware of but not accountable for this competency.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: External validation confirms exclusion: 2 match(es) in governance job postings or certification curricula. A gap here would not be noticeable to a working Federated Governance Group Representative whose mandate centers on policy, oversight, and governance.

decision_rationale: Edge case — excluded on balance: ability from AI Governance (affinity 0.60); strategic/implementation framing outweighs governance signals. STRM composite is strong (0.4914). A Federated Governance Group Representative would be aware of but not accountable for this competency.
